overview: Revive Integrative Health is an integrative and functional medicine practice that helps patients achieve health and vitality by uncovering the root causes of chronic conditions and autoimmunity. The clinic combines conventional medical practices with complementary therapies including acupuncture, herbal medicine, nutrition, and mindfulness.
highlights: Advanced diagnostic testing and functional medicine assessment
Services include acupuncture, massage therapy, nutritional counseling, and allergy elimination
Specializes in thyroid and autoimmune conditions management
targetAudience: Patients with chronic conditions, autoimmune disorders, and thyroid issues seeking integrative healthcare.
